'''âm-d-r''' ('''kamadar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nep|nep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nep|nep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-d-r
|-
! Lemma
| kamadar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimadar|thimadar]] || [[word:jimadar|jimadar]] || [[word:shimadar|shimadar]] || [[word:kimadar|kimadar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumadar|thuthumadar]] || [[word:jujumadar|jujumadar]] || [[word:shushumadar|shushumadar]] || [[word:kukumadar|kukumadar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumadar|thumadar]] || [[word:jumadar|jumadar]] || [[word:shumadar|shumadar]] || [[word:kumadar|kumadar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumadar|thumadar]] || [[word:jumadar|jumadar]] || [[word:shumadar|shumadar]] || [[word:kumadar|kumadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themadar|themadar]] || [[word:jemadar|jemadar]] || [[word:shemadar|shemadar]] || [[word:kemadar|kemadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomadar|thothomadar]] || [[word:jojomadar|jojomadar]] || [[word:shoshomadar|shoshomadar]] || [[word:kokomadar|kokomadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomadar|thomadar]] || [[word:jomadar|jomadar]] || [[word:shomadar|shomadar]] || [[word:komadar|komadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomadar|thomadar]] || [[word:jomadar|jomadar]] || [[word:shomadar|shomadar]] || [[word:komadar|komadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmadar|thĂŠmadar]] || [[word:jĂŠmadar|jĂŠmadar]] || [[word:shĂŠmadar|shĂŠmadar]] || [[word:kĂŠmadar|kĂŠmadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamadar|thathamadar]] || [[word:jajamadar|jajamadar]] || [[word:shashamadar|shashamadar]] || [[word:kakamadar|kakamadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamadar|thamadar]] || [[word:jamadar|jamadar]] || [[word:shamadar|shamadar]] || [[word:kamadar|kamadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamadar|thamadar]] || [[word:jamadar|jamadar]] || [[word:shamadar|shamadar]] || [[word:kamadar|kamadar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamadar|shamadar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamadar|goshamadar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamadar|gokishamadar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamadarnĂŒ|shamadarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamadarnknĂŒ|goshamadarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadarnĂŒ|gokishamadarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamadarshĂ«|shamadarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamadarnkshĂ«|goshamadarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamadarshĂ«|gokishamadarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadaro|shamadaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadarnkro|goshamadarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadaro|gokishamadaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadarmu|shamadarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadarnkmu|goshamadarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadarmu|gokishamadarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamadarsher|shamadarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamadarnksher|goshamadarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamadarsher|gokishamadarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamadarng|shamadarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamadarnkng|goshamadarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamadarng|gokishamadarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamadarya|shamadarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamadarnkya|goshamadarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamadarya|gokishamadarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamadaryam|shamadaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamadarnkyam|goshamadarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamadaryam|gokishamadaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamadarnĂŒshĂ«|shamadarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamadarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamadarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamadarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamadarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadarnĂŒro|shamadarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadarnknĂŒro|goshamadarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadarnĂŒro|gokishamadarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadarnĂŒmu|shamadarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadarnknĂŒmu|goshamadarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadarnĂŒmu|gokishamadarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamadarshĂ«nĂŒ|shamadarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamadarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamadarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamadarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadarshĂ«ro|shamadarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadarnkshĂ«ro|goshamadarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadarshĂ«ro|gokishamadarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadarshĂ«mu|shamadarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadarnkshĂ«mu|goshamadarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadarshĂ«mu|gokishamadarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamadaronĂŒ|shamadaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamadarnkronĂŒ|goshamadarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadaronĂŒ|gokishamadaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamadaroshĂ«|shamadaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamadarnkroshĂ«|goshamadarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamadaroshĂ«|gokishamadaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadaromu|shamadaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadarnkromu|goshamadarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadaromu|gokishamadaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamadarmunĂŒ|shamadarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamadarnkmunĂŒ|goshamadarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadarmunĂŒ|gokishamadarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamadarmushĂ«|shamadarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamadarnkmushĂ«|goshamadarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamadarmushĂ«|gokishamadarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadarmuro|shamadarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadarnkmuro|goshamadarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadarmuro|gokishamadarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
